unternehmen.title: Company
unternehmen.description: We are the No. 1 full-range consumer electronics retailer in Switzerland. Our extensive range covers all well-known brands as well as all current trends and innovations. Speed, foresight and willingness to change are key to ensuring that our product selection always meets the needs of our customers – naturally at the best price-performance ratio.
unternehmen.card_press_desc: Do you have a media inquiry? Find your contact person and current press releases here.
unternehmen.card_jobs_desc: Looking for a job? Discover our open positions. We look forward to your application.
unternehmen.card_sustainability_desc: Want to recycle something? Find out what you can dispose of in an environmentally friendly way with us.
unternehmen.card_sponsoring_desc: Looking for a sponsoring partner? Discover our guidelines for sponsoring requests here.
unternehmen.card_education_desc: Looking for an apprenticeship? Discover the possible apprenticeships with us.
unternehmen.card_advertising_desc: Curious about our current promotions? Discover the latest commercials, offers and campaigns here.

imprint.company_value: Interdiscount – a company of the Coop Group
imprint.disclaimer: This is a clone project for educational purposes and is not affiliated with the real Interdiscount AG.

agb.section1_content: These General Terms and Conditions (GTC) apply to all orders placed through our online shop. By placing an order, the customer accepts these GTC.
agb.section2_content: The contract is concluded upon receipt of the order confirmation by email. The presentation of products in the online shop does not constitute a legally binding offer.
agb.section3_content: All prices are in Swiss Francs (CHF) and include VAT. Shipping is free for orders over CHF 49.
agb.section4_content: Delivery usually takes 2–5 business days. Express delivery is available at an additional cost. Deliveries are made exclusively within Switzerland.
agb.section5_content: The customer has the right to return goods within 14 days without giving reasons. The goods must be returned in perfect condition and in the original packaging.
agb.section6_content: All products carry a statutory warranty period of 2 years from the date of purchase. The Warranty Plus extension can be booked optionally.
agb.section7_content: The processing of personal data is carried out in accordance with our privacy policy and applicable data protection regulations.
agb.section8_content: Swiss law applies. The place of jurisdiction is Jegenstorf.
agb.disclaimer: This is a clone project for educational purposes. These GTC serve only as placeholders.

privacy.section1_content: The party responsible for data processing on this website is Interdiscount, Bernstrasse 90, 3303 Jegenstorf, Switzerland.
privacy.section2_title: 2. Collection and Storage of Personal Data
privacy.section2_content: When visiting our website, information is automatically transmitted to the server (e.g. IP address, browser type, operating system). This data is processed based on our legitimate interest in the security and optimization of our offering.
privacy.section3_content: We use cookies to provide you with the best possible experience on our website. You can adjust your cookie settings at any time through your browser.
privacy.section4_content: Your personal data will not be transmitted to third parties for purposes other than those listed below. We only share your personal data with third parties if you have given your consent or if the disclosure is necessary for the execution of your order.
privacy.section5_content: You have the right to access, rectify, delete and restrict the processing of your personal data. Please contact us at datenschutz{'@'}interdiscount.ch.
privacy.disclaimer: This is a clone project for educational purposes. This privacy policy serves only as a placeholder.
